title: sideritis erythrantha subsp. erythrantha
intro: Sideritis erythrantha subsp. erythrantha, also known as red-flowered mountain tea, is a perennial plant species in the genus Sideritis, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in essential oils and flavonoids, providing several health benefits such as reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Sideritis erythrantha subsp. erythrantha can be consumed as a herbal tea, or in supplement form, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
